title: taraxacum obtusulum
intro: Taraxacum obtusulum, also known as blunt-leaved dandelion or blunt dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum obtusulum include its potential to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion and reducing blood pressure, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Taraxacum obtusulum can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often employed in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
